agent_scopes.mechanism: project (.kiro/agents/) + global (~/.kiro/agents/); global overrides local on name collision — reverse of most Kiro content types

definition_format.mechanism: JSON config files in .kiro/agents/ (project) or ~/.kiro/agents/ (global); prompt field accepts inline string or file:// URI to external .md file

invocation_patterns.mechanism: keyboard shortcut binding for IDE invocation; welcomeMessage shown on agent start; manual selection via agent picker

model_selection.mechanism: model field in agent JSON config overrides workspace default for that agent

per_agent_mcp.mechanism: inline mcpServers map per agent config; includeMcpJson boolean controls whether workspace .kiro/mcp.json is merged into agent's server set

subagent_spawning.mechanism: no subagent spawning mechanism documented for Kiro custom agents

tool_restrictions.mechanism: tools array with exact names, wildcards (computer_*), or MCP-namespaced refs (mcp:serverName:toolName); toolsSettings for per-tool config objects

providerExtensions.name: File URI for externalizing agent prompt
providerExtensions.summary: Load the system prompt from an external Markdown file via a 'file://path' URI instead of embedding inline text.

providerExtensions.name: toolAliases for collision remapping
providerExtensions.summary: Per-agent 'toolAliases' map renaming tools to resolve naming collisions across MCP servers.

providerExtensions.name: Resources attachment (files, skills, knowledge-base)
providerExtensions.summary: Attach files, skills, or knowledge-base entries into the agent's context via a configured resources list.

providerExtensions.name: Inline mcpServers map per agent
providerExtensions.summary: Per-agent 'mcpServers' map scoping MCP server configs to a single agent without touching workspace config.

providerExtensions.name: includeMcpJson flag
providerExtensions.summary: Boolean flag controlling whether workspace .kiro/mcp.json merges into the agent's available MCP servers.

providerExtensions.name: toolsSettings per-tool configuration map
providerExtensions.summary: Provide per-tool configuration objects for fine-grained behavioral settings via a map keyed by tool name.

providerExtensions.name: keyboardShortcut binding
providerExtensions.summary: Bind an IDE keyboard shortcut string for quick agent invocation from the editor.

providerExtensions.name: welcomeMessage shown on agent start
providerExtensions.summary: Optional 'welcomeMessage' string displayed to the user when the agent session starts.
